description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Debian that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have two jobs: build and multiarch. The build job should run on ubuntu-latest, use a matrix strategy to run on different Docker images and compilers, and perform a release build, daily build, VirusTotal scan, and release upload. The multiarch job should also run on ubuntu-latest, use a matrix strategy to run on different architectures and compilers, and perform a release build, daily build, VirusTotal scan, and release upload.
